title: Track events and automate emails using the Bento email marketing platform
excerpt:
Just created a monday automation for myself to send events to Bento, the email marketing platform, for use in email automation flows.

posts.author: reinier (Reinier ― 📅 Calendar Plus 🍅 Automato)
posts.cookedHtml:
Just created a monday automation for myself to send events to Bento, the email marketing platform, for use in email automation flows.

When an item is created, Then send Event type to Bento796×201 5.86 KB

The automation includes all your item’s columns in the event’s details, ready to be included in an email.

This is not a marketplace app at the moment, so if this is any use to you, drop me a line and we can talk about setting this up for you.

posts.author: nancy865miler (nancy)
posts.cookedHtml: It sounds like you’re describing a custom automation—probably for something like Airtable, , or Notion—that automatically includes all an item’s columns in an event’s details so they can be dropped straight into an email.
